text:
The best thing governments could do now is make it actually attractive to hire people instead of the burden it is now

In many parts of the world you can't fire people, you're legally liable if they have an accident working (even remotely at home!), and you're paying their bills

A lot of really cool starts on day 2 of the #vibjeam

This one is QWOP but for climbing!

I will make a compilation of the best videos of dev posted here and post it today, so keep sharing your game builds!
Submitting clash of perps for the #vibejam hackathon, my own twist on my favourite game, clash of clans.
